title: Debesia
taxonomy: Debesia is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification suggests that Debesia is closely related to other orchid genera, sharing similar characteristics and growth habits. Within the Orchidaceae family, Debesia is thought to be part of the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes many epiphytic orchids. The exact classification of Debesia may still be a topic of ongoing research and debate among botanists. Further studies are needed to fully understand the evolutionary relationships between Debesia and other orchid genera.
uses: Debesia has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential benefits in treating various health conditions.
